translations.text: Truly you [people] love this fleeting world
and neglect the life to come.
On that Day there will be radiant faces,
looking towards their Lord,
and on that Day there will be the sad and despairing faces
of those who realize that a great calamity is about to befall them.
Truly, when the soul reaches the collarbone;
when it is said, ‘Could any charm-healer save him now?’;
when he knows it is the final parting;
when his legs are brought together:
on that day he will be driven towards your Lord.
He neither believed nor prayed,
but denied the truth and turned away,
walking back to his people with a conceited swagger.
Closer and closer it comes to you.
Closer and closer still.
Does man think he will be left alone?

text_qpc_hafs: أَلَمۡ يَكُ نُطۡفَةٗ مِّن مَّنِيّٖ يُمۡنَىٰ ٣٧
text_uthmani: أَلَمْ يَكُ نُطْفَةً مِّن مَّنِىٍّ يُمْنَىٰ

translations.text: Was he not just a drop of spilt-out sperm,
which became a clinging form, which God shaped in due proportion,
fashioning from it the two sexes, male and female?

text_qpc_hafs: أَلَيۡسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحۡـِۧيَ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ ٤٠
text_uthmani: أَلَيْسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحْـِۧىَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ

translations.text: Does He who can do this not have the power to bring the dead back to life?

text_qpc_hafs: هَلۡ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلۡإِنسَٰنِ حِينٞ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهۡرِ لَمۡ يَكُن شَيۡـٔٗا مَّذۡكُورًا ١
text_uthmani: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسَـٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا

translations.text: Was there not a period of time when man was nothing to speak of ?

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ مِن نُّطۡفَةٍ أَمۡشَاجٖ نَّبۡتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ سَمِيعَۢا بَصِيرًا ٢
text_uthmani: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا

translations.text: We created man from a drop of mingled fluid to put him to the test; We gave him hearing and sight;

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّا هَدَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرٗا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا ٣
text_uthmani: إِنَّا هَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا

translations.text: We guided him to the right path, whether he was grateful or not.

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّآ أَعۡتَدۡنَا لِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ سَلَٰسِلَاْ وَأَغۡلَٰلٗا وَسَعِيرًا ٤
text_uthmani: إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ سَلَـٰسِلَا۟ وَأَغْلَـٰلًا وَسَعِيرًا

translations.text: We have prepared chains, iron collars, and blazing Fire for the disbelievers, but

text_qpc_hafs: إِنَّ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارَ يَشۡرَبُونَ مِن كَأۡسٖ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا ٥
text_uthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا

translations.text: the righteous will have a drink mixed with kafur,
